title: MuMu and the Microwave
overview: MuMu, who once destroyed his home planet by triggering a war, comes to Earth to relearn technology. He crashes his spaceship into Sakurako’s apartment and ends up living with her. He becomes obsessed with Earth appliances, especially the microwave.

title: MuMu and the Vacuum Cleaner
overview: Mumu continues to attack Sakurako's appliances, still devastated by the loss of her microwave and refrigerator. Unsure of what to do, she finds herself seeking help from her university's cultural associations.

title: MuMu and the Automatic Door
overview: Mumu comes face to face with one of his fellow creatures, Deshimaru, but the latter seems to have a completely different opinion of Earthlings...

title: Tenkubashi and Wireless Power Transmission
overview: Tenkûbashi has decided to build a remote phone charger. Why? No one really knows, but Sakurako has an idea...

title: MuMu and the Air Conditioner
overview: Faced with a faulty air conditioner in the middle of a heatwave, Sakurako must put Tenkûbashi's teachings into practice.

title: MuMu and the Rice Cooker
overview: Trapped by a devious pressure cooker, Mumu finds herself learning more about induction.

title: Samezu and the Thermometer
overview: While Samezu shows off his knowledge of thermometers, Tenkûbashi and Rokugô prepare to face a terrible curse...

title: MuMu and the Power Outlet
overview: A dark tale of good luck charms leads Sonoko to suffer the antics of Tenkûbashi, while Sakurako discovers the lost treasures of GERH...

title: MuMu and the TV
overview: Sakurako finds herself having to work to pay her electricity bills. Meanwhile, Mumu develops a taste for television.

title: MuMu and the Camera
overview: Sakurako discovers Samezu's extensive knowledge, while Mumu and Deshimaru begin making videos.

title: MuMu and the Air Purifier
overview: Mumu and Sakurako find themselves forced to use all their knowledge to deal with the appearance of a spaceship in the skies above Tokyo.

title: MuMu and the Battery
overview: As Sakurako is still recovering from the radical attack, Tenkûbashi entrusts her with a mission of the utmost importance...

title: Sakurako and the Cultural Festival
overview: The Keikyu University festival is in full swing, and while Sakurako initially enjoys the atmosphere that permeates the campus, Tenkûbashi has a little surprise in store for her.

title: Anamori and GPS
overview: Sakurako helps the elderly in her neighborhood while Siberia struggles to determine if humanity is worth preserving.

title: MuMu and Photosynthesis
overview: The students of Keikyu University rely on Tenkuubashi to save them from the heatwave and on Sakurako for their clandestine vegetable garden.

title: MuMu and the Action Camera
overview: Sakurako is engrossed in an AR cat collecting game. When she heads to the park where a strong opponent is said to appear, she finds the familiar characters gathered there? Meanwhile, Sakurako becomes suspicious of Moomoo, who keeps going out at night. She secretly attaches an action camera to him, and what she sees on camera is...

title: MuMu and the Refrigerator
overview: Sakurako and Muumuu carry their neighbor Kitashinagawa, who has passed out drunk in the park, back to her room. After seeing her room, Sakurako notices something and decides to lease a refrigerator from the Human Regeneration Research Society. But behind the scenes, Carnival, the most heroic radical, is also eyeing the refrigerator?

title: Rokugo and the EMS
overview: Rokugo represents the club in their regular outdoor volunteer activities. Worried about the gazes of the girls, including Akina, he decides to get in shape using an EMS muscle training machine. Meanwhile, Sakurako is troubled by the rising cost of utilities. She tries various ways to save money, but...

title: Tenkubashi, Lies, and Video Tape
overview: The members of the Human Regeneration Research Society and Sonoko are volunteering at a nursery school. They have a hard time dealing with the children every day, so they decide to plan a strategy for their next play. Meanwhile, the Human Regeneration Research Society is in the midst of a big end-of-year cleaning. Then, a mysterious videotape is discovered.

title: Akihiro and the Tankless Toilet
overview: Decimal is troubled by Akihiro's fixed gaze. It seems he is worried that he doesn't use the cat litter box, but as cat-like aliens have no concept of excretion, he doesn't really understand. While Sakurako is explaining how the litter box works, he bumps into Samezu?

title: Sonoko and USB
overview: Tenkubashi and Sonoko have a secret routine, but Sonoko rejects him, telling him to "stay away from me." However, will this be the catalyst for a change in their relationship? Furthermore, Sakurako and Akihiro also see progress through a demonstration sale of disaster prevention goods.

title: MuMu and the Retro Appliances
overview: A retro boom is sweeping the nation among young people. Sakurako and Tenkubashi compete to see who has the best taste in retro home appliances stored in the Human Regeneration Research Society's warehouse. On their way home, Muumuu tells Sakurako that he envies the culture of looking back. Behind this lies the words of a certain researcher...

title: MuMu, Sakurako and the Risk of Apocalypse
overview: Appearing before the Moomoos are the remains of the Brain, who once controlled the war - a clone of Doctor Octal, created as a way to spite the Moomoos. Meanwhile, Sakurako and Anamori are being held captive along with Samezu. How will they overcome this crisis?

title: MuMu, Sakurako and the Day the Earth Stood Still
overview: The Earth is on the brink of destruction due to the aftermath of a conflict between extraterrestrial life forms. In this desperate situation, Tenkubashi says, "There is a way to save the Earth!" That way is to stop the Earth. In order to overcome this unprecedented crisis, will the feelings of Earthlings be united through "cats" and smartphones?
